headline: Northside Strength opens its third Berlin location
dek: The coaching-led studio brand expands to Prenzlauer Berg with a recovery-first floorplan.
body:
Northside Strength Co. today announced the opening of its third Berlin studio in Prenzlauer Berg. The new 400-square-meter location leads with a recovery zone — sauna, cold plunge, and mobility space — alongside its signature small-group strength floor.

The brand, founded by two former personal trainers, has grown to more than 1,200 members across the city since 2023.
